data.title: ICUI: Durable growth, margin gains, and software integration drive value as leverage nears target
data.description:
Healthy U.S. hospital volumes and durable consumables growth support a positive outlook, while the company leverages innovation and software integration to defend and expand its infusion pump market share. Margin improvements and debt reduction remain key priorities, with share buybacks planned once leverage targets are met.

data.title: CTMX: CX-2051 delivered promising phase 1 results in CRC, driving platform validation and future growth
data.description:
Probody masking technology achieved clinical validation in 2025, with CX-2051 showing strong efficacy and safety in late-stage colorectal cancer. Pipeline progress includes CX801 in melanoma and preclinical CX908, while robust cash reserves fund operations into 2027.

data.title: KPTI: Phase III myelofibrosis data in March could unlock a $1B U.S. market, with cash runway into 2026
data.description:
Selinexor continues to expand globally in multiple myeloma, with major near-term focus on myelofibrosis and endometrial cancer. Phase III SENTRY trial data in myelofibrosis is expected in March, targeting a $1B U.S. market, and recent financial restructuring extends cash runway into 2026.
